name: GitHub Copilot Certification — GH-300
summary: Microsoft & GitHub's developer credential for GitHub Copilot. Validates that you can use Copilot's full feature set well — completions, chat, agents, CLI, MCP, Spaces, Spark, and code review — use it responsibly, understand its data and architecture, craft prompts and context, drive real developer productivity, and configure privacy and safeguards.

exam.recommendedPrep: MS Learn 'GitHub Copilot Fundamentals' Parts 1 & 2 + hands-on Copilot across the IDE, chat, CLI, and agents

blueprintNote: Domains and weights normalized from the official GH-300 skills-measured ranges (Use Copilot features 25–30%, Use Copilot responsibly 15–20%, and the remaining four at 10–15% each), rounded to sum to 1.0. Format: ~60 scored questions, 100 minutes, 700/1000 to pass, proctored via Pearson VUE. Verify against the live Microsoft Learn GH-300 study guide before launch — the engine reads weights from data, so a correction is a content edit.

verification.notes: Weights re-checked against the live MS Learn study guide; confirmed the blueprint still lists Edit Mode (taught as Edit vs Agent) despite the mid-2026 product change.

badge.definition: Completed the Automatos Academy GH-300 preparation track to the A+ readiness standard: ≥90% blueprint-weighted mastery and a full-length mock passed with margin (≥800/1000). This certifies preparation completion — the GH-300 credential itself is issued only by GitHub/Microsoft.

officialResources.title: GH-300 Study Guide — official (Microsoft Learn)
officialResources.annotation: The authoritative blueprint: the six skills-measured groups, their weight ranges, and the January-2026 changelog. This curriculum is built directly to it.

officialResources.title: GitHub Copilot (GH-300) — certification page
officialResources.annotation: Exam overview, price ($99), languages, Pearson VUE scheduling, and the link to the official practice assessment and exam sandbox.

officialResources.title: GitHub Copilot Fundamentals — Part 1 (Microsoft Learn path)
officialResources.annotation: Free official learning path: intro, features, prompt engineering, Spaces, management. The closest thing to official study material — work it end to end.

officialResources.title: GitHub Copilot Fundamentals — Part 2 (Microsoft Learn path)
officialResources.annotation: The January-2026 features: Agent mode, cloud/coding agent, MCP, code review, and language-specific use.

officialResources.title: GitHub Copilot documentation (root)
officialResources.annotation: Primary source for every feature claim on this track. When a community guide and the docs disagree, the docs win.

videos.title: The GH-300 blueprint & how to sit it
